name: production-error-sweep
title: Production Error Sweep
summary: Continuously triage redacted production error summaries and prepare bounded fixes for external verification.

inputs.name: summary_url
inputs.description: Authenticated endpoint returning redacted error status/evidence.

schedule.rationale: Keep watching until the external error gate reports settled.

evidence.name: error-summary
evidence.description: Aggregated fingerprints, counts, deployment context, and external verification state.

expected_artifacts.name: triage-report
expected_artifacts.description: Findings, minimal repair, verification, and rollback notes.

expected_artifacts.name: run-journal
expected_artifacts.description: Durable execution and effect audit trail.

safety.rationale: Only redacted summaries enter the loop; deployment and destructive actions require approval.
safety.secrets: Fetch credentials from environment bindings and never place raw logs, tokens, or personal data in state, prompts, journals, or reports.
